If no probate codes are cited this will be an issue for hearing. 2) Please provide a short precise summary of what the judicial officer is being asked to approve in this petition. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 7/26/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JANET JEAN CHUN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/24/21. (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: No proposed order has been submitted. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.60 J.] PLEASE READ THE LOCAL RULES: a proposed order must be provided as a hard copy. The proof of service of notice should be filed separately, not attached to another pleading. Furthermore, it should be completely verified. The other beneficiaries consented to the distribution of the tangible personal property to the administrator without equalizing cash for the $1,500 appraised value of such property? Courtesy copies of papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 8/13/21. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RALPH F. OLIVERIO JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues may include: 1) Petitioner requests reimbursement of statutory attorney's fees already paid. 2) Petitioner requests reimbursement of extraordinary attorney's fees already paid. The amount being requested is the difference between the total amount Petitioner previously paid to his attorney and the statutory fees. Separate timesheets for extraordinary services have not been provided. Separate timesheets for ordinary services have not been provided. No statement of services has been provided by the attorney who provided the services. 3) Bond was never increased, despite receipts of over $185,000. Petitioner avers that to require a petition to increase bond would not be efficient or in the interest of justice as most or all of the remaining funds will be distributed to Petitioner. It is noted that minutes from the hearing on appointment states that "If assets are discovered, Mr. Fiol will need to file a petition for bond." Other Notes: parking and bridge tolls are not reimbursable costs. $32.35 will be subtracted from request. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review the 10th amended general order. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Information regarding appearance by CourtCall can be found in the 10th amended general order.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LAURENCE WILLIAM TINSLEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/7/2021. 1) A Corrected Amended First and Final Report was filed 7/6/2021. There is no such filing as a "Corrected" pleading. This must be refiled as an Amendment or Amended Petition and noticed. (See CRC 7.3, 7.53). 2) Endorsed-filed single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a courtesy copy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. Courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top cover page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. 3) Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top cover page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 8/23/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE BEYER FAMILY REMAINDER ANNUITY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Reformation As To Distributive Provisions Of Trust
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LOUISA THEADORA MARIA VAN VELZEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/11/2021. Issues: 1) If a citizen of a foreign country dies without leaving a will or leaves a will without naming an executor, or if it appears that property will pass to a citizen of a foreign country, notice shall be given to a recognized diplomatic or consular official of the foreign country maintaining an office in the United States. [Probate Code 8113]. 2) The petition alleges bond is not required because all heirs at law are adults and have waived bond. Amendment does not address this issue. Not all the alleged heirs have waived bond. It appears full bond of $1,200,000.00 is required. 3) Once notice is perfected the matter will have to go on for hearing for the judicial officer to determine how to proceed and whether more research regarding heirs must be done. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 7/26/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GERALD LOREN FRITZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing for the sole purpose of admitting the will. No appearance required. No conformed copy of signed order will be returned (no self-addressed stamped envelope provided). Petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report of status of administration must be filed by 07/26/2022. If not on file, appearance required at status hearing set for 08/09/2022.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF NANCY BOYKIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: continued to 8/17/21. as discussed with counsel by email, a probate referee must appraise the property and sign the I & A, which is then attached to the amended petition. after filing the amended petition, a POS of the NOH must be filed and a proposed order delivered to the court. please note, examner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.
